title: Manager, Business Intelligence & Analytics
summary: Leading BI, Analytics, and Data Science integration for a post-acquisition organization — managing a combined team while designing and building a next-generation consolidated analytics platform.
highlights: Designed and executed the migration plan to consolidate reporting onto a unified next-generation platform, driving >$1M in annual licensing savings.
Assessed ETL, reporting, and analytics systems across both organizations; identified high-risk fragile components and stabilized critical workflows.
Challenged the legacy Data Warehouse architecture and delivered an alternative design recognized as the #1 enhancement by business stakeholders during UAT and Production rollout.
Led rapid team expansion — onboarding, mentoring, and integrating new talent across multiple in-flight projects while maintaining legacy system stability.

title: Senior Manager, Business Intelligence
summary: Built the data engineering and analytics function from zero — selected the technology stack, hired and led the team, and governed data quality and delivery standards across a high-growth medical device company.
highlights: Architected the full modern data stack — selected Fivetran, dbt, and GCP/BigQuery; directed implementation; established data quality standards, alerting systems, and operational playbooks.
Oversaw integrations with 12+ source systems including NetSuite, Salesforce, Shopify, IQVIA SmartSolve, Google Analytics, and manufacturing data feeds.
Led integration of data from 12+ manufacturing cells into the data lake, enabling OEE analytics and real-time visibility that identified and resolved a $10M field failure issue.
Built and governed predictive analytics and ML capabilities — customer segmentation, LTV scoring, cohort attrition, marketing optimization, and system health monitoring.
Established a Data Governance Board, project prioritization framework, and cross-team coordination model that scaled with the organization.

title: Senior Director, Business Intelligence
summary: Built and led the data organization as Senior Director for five years — managing Data Engineers, Analysts, and Data Scientists while owning the company's BI strategy and infrastructure for a DTC platform serving 10M+ users.
highlights: Formulated the company Data Strategy and stood up the Data Governance Board — establishing the prioritization and accountability frameworks that scaled with rapid commercial growth.
Designed and oversaw implementation of the enterprise data warehouse and pipeline — establishing data quality and reliability standards supporting the full business lifecycle.
Managed a team delivering analytics across marketing performance, customer acquisition, conversion, LTV, and business liquidity calculations for creditors.
Directed the design of a custom Magento-to-NetSuite integration — a high-volume, spike-tolerant data pipeline built for peak retail traffic loads.
Established and enforced BI delivery standards across Tableau Online, Python, and R — raising quality and consistency of all analytical outputs organization-wide.

title: Associate Director, Analytics
summary: Promoted from individual contributor to Associate Director — rebuilt the analytics function and turned around underperforming revenue-generating Tableau products.
highlights: Overhauled Tableau licensing and delivery strategy, saving $50K annually and achieving a 400% increase in end-user adoption and engagement.
Managed analytics and BI teams across California and Indiana, establishing delivery standards and performance management practices.

title: Director, Business Intelligence
summary: Built the Business Intelligence program from zero at a high-growth internet startup — established the team, technology, and delivery model.
highlights: Led a team converting high-volume web logs into structured analytics datasets powering dynamic Tableau dashboards.
Designed and deployed a Go/No-Go Decision Tool that optimized marketing ROI against user acquisition funnels — directly supporting budget allocation decisions.
Transformed a fragile ETL system into a reliable, monitored pipeline, eliminating data accuracy and timeliness issues across the organization.

title: Director, Data Analytics
summary: Established and led the analytics and BI function over eight years — building the team, data warehouse, and reporting infrastructure that supported a university through 300% annualized growth.
highlights: Co-designed and built the Enterprise Data Warehouse — authoring the ETL framework, data model, and compliance reporting infrastructure for a large-scale online university.
Designed and implemented a predictive analytics program that identified students at high risk of academic failure, enabling targeted counselor interventions that reduced adverse outcomes by 18%.
Managed Tableau Server and analytics infrastructure for thousands of users across diverse academic and operational departments.
